caption: A woman with blonde-tipped hair tied up in a bun is recorded in a studio setting, wearing a black t-shirt and over-ear headphones. She is seated behind a professional microphone and smiles slightly throughout the sequence. In the background, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in red text. To her right, a yellow vertical stripe separates the wall from a dark area featuring the logo "BOSS TALK 101" in red and white, accompanied by the smaller text "Podcast" and "Br. 11 logo date." A small sign above the screen reads "Employee Only." The scene remains static in terms of camera angle and positioning; the only change across the frames is the woman's subtle shifts in facial expression and head tilt as she looks toward someone off-camera.
